description: Assert that two `u8` values are equal. Panic otherwise.
Assert that an `Option<u8>` value is `None`. Panic otherwise.
Assert that the current input is spent in a transaction that can only appear a distance of at least the specified `Distance` blocks after the input's UTXO. Panic otherwise.
Assert that the current input is spent in a transaction that can only appear a duration of at least the specified `Duration` units of 512 seconds after the input's UTXO. Panic otherwise.
Check if two `Confidential` values are equal.
